title: Automating workflows and file organization with Antigravity
summary: Antigravity is a tool for automating file system workflows based on time boxes and tags. It helps developers organize GitHub repositories and local files across multiple projects, reducing time spent on file management and mental fatigue.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video demonstrates Antigravity, a tool that automates file system workflows using time boxes and tags. It addresses the time and mental fatigue developers spend organizing GitHub repositories and local files across multiple projects. The takeaway: Antigravity handles file management through tag-based and time-boxed automation, consolidating organization that would otherwise be manual.
